title: Bloomberg Law: ICE Raises the Stakes for Employers’ I-9 Compliance Failures | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

## Bloomberg Law: ICE Raises the Stakes for Employers’ I-9 Compliance Failures

New Immigration and Customs Enforcement guidance is expected to increase financial and compliance risks for employers managing I-9 requirements. In an article published in Bloomberg Law , Partner Daniel Brown discussed how the updated enforcement approach could lead to substantially higher penalties and prompt employers to more closely review their compliance practices.

Fragomen earned top national and regional rankings in Chambers USA 2026, including its 13th consecutive year in Band 1 nationwide.
